title: 1.1: States that startup begins with the printed message `default engine options set`, as it identifies how the program begins.
1.2: States that engine bring-up is confirmed by the printed message `engine initialized`, as it describes how the scanning engine initializes.
1.3: States that matcher initialization begins when the output prints `setting up aho-corasick core`, as matcher construction is part of the startup sequence.
1.5: States that detector preparation begins when the output prints a line starting with `starting detector workers`, as it describes how detectors prepare for use.
1.7: States that operational execution begins when the output prints `running source`, as it shows movement from component bring-up into actual work.
2.1: Claims that enumeration output appears before worker activation output.
2.2: Claims that detector activation depends on printed secret findings.
2.3:  Claims that early output such as `default engine options set` indicates scanning activity.
